data.title: Hyperliquid invites proposals to launch USDH stablecoin, facing criticism for alleged unfairness by an existing stablecoin protocol.
data.description: A well-known stablecoin protocol based on Hyperliquid technology has expressed disagreement with the recent USDH proposal announcement, describing it as unjust.

data.title: ONDO stays at $0.93 amid mixed signals from technical analysis and whale accumulation, despite $0.93 trading value.
data.description: The cryptocurrency ONDO is currently trading at $0.93 with a small increase for the day, benefiting from the support of whale accumulation. However, technical analysis shows mixed signals with both bullish and bearish indicators.

data.title: Ciena beats Q3 estimates with 29.4% revenue growth to $1.22 billion, EPS of 67 cents. Q4 revenue expected: $1.24-$1.32 billion. Stock price: $116.29. Analysts adjust price targets, with a Buy rating and $130 target from Needham analyst.
data.description: Ciena Corporation (NYSE: CIEN) announced its fiscal third-quarter 2025 results, surpassing expectations. The company experienced a 29.4% year-on-year increase in quarterly revenue, reaching $1.22 billion, exceeding the projected $1.18 billion. The telecom networking equipment and software services provider reported an adjusted EPS of 67 cents, outperforming the estimated 53 cents. For the upcoming fourth quarter, Ciena anticipates revenue in the range of $1.24 billion to $1.32 billion, higher than the $1.21 billion consensus. The projected adjusted gross margin is expected to be between 42% and 43%. Despite the positive results, Ciena's shares saw a 0.5% decline, trading at $116.29 on Friday. Analysts reacted to the earnings release by adjusting their price targets. Needham analyst Ryan Koontz reiterated a Buy rating on Ciena and raised the price target from $90 to $130. Meanwhile, Rosenblatt analyst Mike Genovese...

data.title: Datavault AI addresses management vesting schedule disclosures in Beaverton, Ore. No specific numbers mentioned.
data.description: Datavault AI, based in Beaverton, Oregon, has issued a statement through Business Wire regarding the clarification of disclosures related to management associated vesting schedule filings that were recently reported. The company aims to provide transparency regarding this matter. No specific details were disclosed in the rephrased information.

data.title: Tony Lama adds 6 new 12" cowboy boots to Men's Derby Collection, including Plano Suede & Marco Goat. Expanding modern Western offering.
data.description: Unveiling the Plano Suede and Marco Goat in FORT WORTH, Texas on September 5, 2025, Tony Lama Boots presents a noteworthy enhancement to its Men's Derby Collection. The brand introduces six new 12-inch cowboy boots, enriching its contemporary Western selection. The Plano Suede and Marco Goat editions stand out in this expansion, adding to the brand's innovative lineup.

data.title: American Eagle experiences a slight sales drop following Sydney Sweeney ad. Second quarter ends 9 days post-release, limited impact seen.
data.description: The ad was released towards the end of the second quarter, with only nine days remaining in the quarter to gauge the campaign's overall impact.

data.title: India's bridge construction market set to grow at a CAGR of 7.41% to reach USD 15 billion by 2031, driven by modular construction and urbanization.
data.description: The India Bridge Construction Market is witnessing significant growth potential, as per the latest report by ResearchAndMarkets.com. Valued at USD 10 billion in 2025, the market is expected to reach USD 15 billion by 2031, indicating a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.41%. This growth is attributed to increasing infrastructure investments and the necessity to overcome obstacles like rivers, roads, and railways. There is a growing demand for advanced bridge solutions in the country to cater to these needs.

data.title: Luxury home builder Toll Brothers opens new Boxwood community for sale in Collegeville, PA. NYSE:TOL.
data.description: In Collegeville, Pennsylvania, Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE:TOL), the top luxury home builder in the country, has announced the opening of their latest community, Boxwood. This new community is now available for sale in Collegeville.

data.title: Fed's inflation rate surge reduces odds of July rate cut; Trump displeased. S&P 500 climbs, eyeing new Fed chair.
data.description: The Federal Reserve's primary inflation measure exceeded expectations, reducing the likelihood of a rate cut in July, which disappointed President Trump. This news comes as the S&P 500 saw an increase.

data.title: U.S. labor market weakens, with only 22,000 jobs added in August and possible Fed rate cuts coming soon. Wall Street optimistic.
data.description: The U.S. labor market experienced a significant slowdown over the summer, with a sharp decline in job growth. In August, nonfarm payrolls only increased by 22,000, a notable drop from July's increase of 79,000. Furthermore, June saw a revision indicating a loss of 13,000 jobs, marking the worst monthly performance since December 2020. The three-month average currently stands at 29,000, a concerning level that strongly suggests the need for Federal Reserve intervention in the form of rate cuts. It is widely anticipated that the first rate cut of 25 basis points will occur at the September 17 meeting, with additional reductions likely in October and December. Despite these challenges in the labor market, Wall Street remains optimistic due to expectations of lower rates. The situation is further complicated by worries about seasonal trends.

data.title: RFK Jr. is linking Tylenol use in pregnancy to higher autism risk in a drop of Tylenol-maker KVUE stock. Report suggests folate treatment can reduce symptoms, emphasizing acetaminophen exposure and low folate for autism. HHS to publish this month.
data.description: The Health Secretary, Robert F. Kennedy Jr., is set to release a report revealing a potential link between the use of an over-the-counter pain reliever during pregnancy and a higher risk of autism. This report may impact Tylenol-maker KVUE as their stock is decreasing. Additionally, the report is expected to discuss research indicating that a folate-based treatment could potentially help reduce autism symptoms in specific individuals. The report, to be published by the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) this month, will focus on two key factors associated with autism: low folate levels and prenatal exposure to acetaminophen (commonly known as Tylenol). For more information, consider visiting Benzinga.com.

data.title: Travis King appointed to head legal team at Texas LNG project in Houston; final investment decision expected by 2025.
data.description: Today, Glenfarne Group, LLC, the developer behind the Texas LNG project, announced the appointment of Travis King, a seasoned LNG legal professional based in Houston, to head the legal and compliance team for the project. Texas LNG, situated in the Port of Brownsville, Texas, is an upcoming liquefied natural gas export terminal operated by Glenfarne's subsidiary, Texas LNG Brownsville LLC. In his new role, King will be responsible for managing all legal and compliance activities for Texas LNG as the project nears its anticipated final investment decision slated for the conclusion of 2025.
